summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Norma Facile 2.0 Invoicing Module. Backend APIs working well (84% pass rate), but critical frontend Select component errors causing crashes.

minor_issues.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 for successful conversions

ui_bugs.issue: Runtime error: Select.Item must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.details: Causes app crashes when navigating, specifically affects document type filters, client selection, and other dropdowns

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepting click events prevents navigation
ui_bugs.details: Users cannot navigate to other pages when dialogs are open

integration_issues.issue: Cannot fully test due to Select component crashes

passed_tests: Invoice CRUD operations (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH /api/invoices/)
Client form modal opening and form fields
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix Select component value prop errors in frontend. All Select components need proper value handling to prevent empty string values. Also fix modal overlay click interception issues that prevent navigation.

success_percentage.frontend: 40% (basic functionality works but crashes prevent full testing)
